title: Approval of issuance of bonds by State Bond Commission
doc_html:
§2740.83.  Approval of issuance of bonds by State Bond Commission

The approval of the State Bond Commission shall be obtained prior to the issuance of any bonds of the district pursuant to the rules and regulations of the State Bond Commission.

Acts 2003, No. 904, §1.
